meaning: Fellow of the Royal Geographical Society(英国)皇家地理学会会员
examples: The military has tried to help by creating special Family Readiness Groups or FRGs.
Most FRGs have to resort to bake sales, car washes and the like to pay for their events.
Captain BRIAN MASON (Rear Detachment, 875th Engineering Brigade): For some reason or another, a lot of these ladies have too great of an emotional investment in the FRGs and what takes place.
